component.name: Connected
component.summary: Phone connectivity applet for the COSMIC desktop

description.p: Connected is a panel applet for the COSMIC desktop environment that provides phone-to-desktop connectivity using KDE Connect as a backend.

ul.li: Device battery status and connectivity monitoring
SMS messaging with conversation threads
Media player remote control
Desktop notifications for calls, messages, and file transfers
Ping your phone to find it
File sharing between devices

description.p: Desktop and laptop peer support, pair-state reliability, SMS first-open truncation fix, and UI tightening.

ul.li: Added desktop and laptop peer support with inline share primitives and Enter-to-send on share-text inputs
Improved pair-state reliability via correct upstream D-Bus signal names and deferred-refresh handling for bursty signals
Fixed SMS thread truncation on first open with daemon-driven retry
Fixed message thread not auto-scrolling to newest message on open for cached threads
Added hover tooltips on the refresh, settings, and notification-dismiss icon buttons
Tightened device page layout: Pair/Unpair moved to the actions list, notification count rendered as a badge, accent color restricted to actionable UI

description.p: Native file chooser, SMS reliability improvements, Flatpak icon fix, and conversation list bootstrap hardening.

ul.li: Fixed conversation list bootstrap to handle cold-start, quiet-window settling, and late-arriving daemon cache data
Replaced rfd/gtk3 file dialog with libcosmic's native xdg-portal file chooser
Fixed SMS message handling with optimistic send and body-based reconciliation
Converted subscriptions to long-lived to fix premature termination
Fixed missing applet icon in COSMIC Panel settings for Flatpak installs
Fixed conversation list truncating the chevron for long message previews

description.p: MMS attachments, group messaging, and bug fixes.

ul.li: MMS attachment viewing with thumbnails in message bubbles
Multi-recipient support for new message compose
Fixed empty conversation list on cold start
Fixed APP_ID mismatch preventing applet from appearing on panel
